title: Procurement Manager (Data center)
description:
about the company
Our client is a leading Asia-focused digital infrastructure platform that designs, builds, and operates hyperscale data centers. They are hiring a Procurement Manager to drive procurement excellence through strong data analytics, market insights, and cross-country collaboration. The role will own procurement dashboards and reporting, including spend management, lead-time analysis, and OPEX cost benchmarking, to support clear and timely decision-making. In addition, the role will lead Scope 3 ESG initiatives from a procurement standpoint, driving improvement actions and maintaining clear, transparent ESG dashboards.

about the job

  • Procurement Dashboards & Reporting

    • Own and manage procurement dashboards covering spend, savings, lead times, OPEX benchmarking, and key performance indicators.

    • Prepare structured MIS reports, including spend analysis, lead-time studies, and commodity impact assessments, for HQ and senior leadership review.

    • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and timely reporting across multiple countries.

    • Identify and analyse key commodity cost drivers (e.g. metals, foreign exchange, fuel, logistics) to support informed and data-driven decision-making.

  • RFP / RFQ Management

    • Lead and manage RFP and RFQ processes for data center projects, particularly across new and emerging markets.

    • Partner with country teams to support supplier evaluations, develop negotiation strategies, and provide award recommendations.

    • Ensure sourcing decisions align with cost, lead-time, quality, and risk management objectives.


skills and experience required

  • preferably talents with at least 8 years of purchasing & quantity surveeying experience in data center 


To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you may contact Noelle at noelle.ng(@)randstad.com.sg .
(EA: 94C3609/R1982617)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
